_meta.source: QuickTeam TalentBridge dashboard RLHF export, 61 human-rated postings, last trained 2026-07-07
_meta.gold_verdict_rule: rating>=4 -> qualified; rating==3 -> nurture; rating<=2 -> disqualified. This is QuickTeam (staffing-seller) truth, NOT the old AI's job-seeker verdict.
_meta.correction: true when the human gold_verdict disagrees with the old AI ai_verdict — these are the entries that re-orient the rubric
